corrections.original: I was originally going to fly to Tokyo next week... I will just take the bullet train to Kyoto Friday morning.
corrections.replacement: I take the bullet train, to save time, to Kyoto, on Friday morning.
corrections.reason: CFLT requires core action first (take the bullet train), followed by reason, space, and time. Earlier alternatives are dropped as they are not part of the final decision.

suggestions.rationale: Bullet trains are faster than driving and more convenient than short-haul flights.
The Shinkansen offers beautiful views of Mount Fuji and the countryside.
Train seats are spacious and you can walk around, unlike on a plane.

cases.cflt_text: 我决定自己整理所有证据，因为报警和索赔太麻烦，在家里，今晚。

transformer_response.cflt_l1: 我决定自己整理所有证据，因为报警和索赔太麻烦，在家里，今晚。
transformer_response.cflt_l2: I decided to organize all evidence by myself, because reporting and claiming were too troublesome, at home, tonight.
transformer_response.standard_l2: I decided to stay home tonight and organize all the evidence myself, since reporting to the police and insurance seemed too troublesome.
transformer_response.standard_l1: 我本来想报警，但觉得太麻烦。也考虑过明天去保险公司填索赔单。最后我决定今晚留在家里自己整理所有证据。

corrections.original: 本来想报警…考虑过明天去保险公司…最后我决定…
corrections.replacement: 我决定自己整理所有证据，因为报警和索赔太麻烦
corrections.reason: CFLT requires the core result to precede the reason. The past considerations are moved to the reason slot.

slots.content_l1: 我决定自己整理所有证据
slots.content_l2: I decided to organize all evidence by myself

slots.content_l1: 因为报警和索赔太麻烦
slots.content_l2: because reporting and claiming were too troublesome

suggestions.value_l1: 因为报警和索赔太麻烦
suggestions.value_l2: because reporting and claiming were too troublesome
suggestions.rationale: 用户明确提到觉得报警太麻烦，这也解释了为何不选择保险索赔。
自己整理证据可能是为了快速处理以防止损失扩大。
避免与多个机构打交道，自己处理可能更直接。

cases.cflt_text: 去意大利餐厅，因为朋友推荐，在第五大道，今晚7点。

transformer_response.cflt_l1: 去意大利餐厅，因为朋友推荐，在第五大道，今晚7点。
transformer_response.cflt_l2: Go to the Italian restaurant, because friend recommended, on Fifth Avenue, tonight at 7pm.
transformer_response.standard_l2: Let's go to the Italian restaurant on Fifth Avenue at 7pm tonight since my friend recommended it.
transformer_response.standard_l1: 既然朋友推荐了第五大道的意大利餐厅，我们今晚7点就去那里吧。

corrections.original: 可以试试新开的寿司店，或者市中心的牛排店。不过我朋友刚发消息推荐第五大道的意大利餐厅，那就今晚7点去那里吧。
corrections.replacement: 去意大利餐厅...因为朋友推荐...
corrections.reason: CFLT requires the core result (go to Italian restaurant) to precede the reason (friend's recommendation). The alternative suggestions about sushi and steak are irrelevant and omitted.

cases.cflt_text: 坐新干线，因为想去京都旅行，在京都，周五早上。

transformer_response.cflt_l1: 坐新干线，因为想去京都旅行，在京都，周五早上。
transformer_response.cflt_l2: Take the bullet train, to visit Kyoto, in Kyoto, on Friday morning.
transformer_response.standard_l2: Take the bullet train to Kyoto on Friday morning.
transformer_response.standard_l1: 周五早上坐新干线去京都旅行。

corrections.original: 坐新干线去京都
corrections.replacement: 坐新干线 / 在京都
corrections.reason: Slot exclusivity: destination 京都 belongs in space, not bundled into core. Core captures the action (坐新干线 / take the bullet train); space captures the destination.

suggestions.rationale: 前往京都最直接的动机是旅行。

suggestions.value_l1: 因为京都有想去的寺庙
suggestions.rationale: 京都以寺庙闻名，可能是主要吸引点。

suggestions.value_l2: because Kyoto is closer than Tokyo
suggestions.rationale: 相比东京，京都距离更近，出行更方便。
